    • 异常错误 org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.BeanDefinitionException

      class BeanDefinitionException extends org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.BeansException implements Serializable

    • 异常错误 org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.BeanNotOfRequiredTypeException

      class BeanNotOfRequiredTypeException extends org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.BeansException implements Serializable

    • 异常错误 org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.BeansException

      class BeansException extends org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.NestedRuntimeException implements Serializable

    • 异常错误 org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.ErrorResponseException

      class ErrorResponseException extends org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.NestedRuntimeException implements Serializable

      • 序列化字段

        • statusCode
          int statusCode

    • 异常错误 org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.NestedRuntimeException

      class NestedRuntimeException extends RuntimeException implements Serializable

    • 异常错误 org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.NoSuchBeanDefinitionException

      class NoSuchBeanDefinitionException extends org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.BeanDefinitionException implements Serializable

    • 异常错误 org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.NoUniqueBeanDefinitionException

      class NoUniqueBeanDefinitionException extends org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.BeanDefinitionException implements Serializable

    • 异常错误 org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.ServerErrorException

      class ServerErrorException extends ErrorResponseException implements Serializable

    • 异常错误 org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.ServerWebInputException

      class ServerWebInputException extends ErrorResponseException implements Serializable

    • 异常错误 org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.UnsatisfiedDependencyException

      class UnsatisfiedDependencyException extends org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.BeanCreationException implements Serializable

  • 程序包 org.xiaoyu.micro.web

    • 类 org.xiaoyu.micro.web.DispatcherServlet

      class DispatcherServlet extends jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServlet implements Serializable

        • applicationContext
          org.xiaoyu.micro.context.ApplicationContext applicationContext
        • faviconPath
